title: The 3-Year Car Lease Trap That Costs $22,000
hook: Everyone assumes leasing is the smart move for that lower monthly payment — but serial leasing costs $22,000 more than buying over a decade, and dealers know you'll never do the math.
angle: Exposes serial leasing as more expensive than buying — lower monthly payments mask zero equity and mounting lifetime costs that buyers never see
audience: Car shoppers, millennials, anyone who has leased or considered leasing a vehicle
key_numbers: $21,996 paid into a 3-year lease with $0 equity built
3 leases = $65,988 paid over 9 years, nothing owned
$22,000 more expensive than buying over a decade
